predicate_mappings.kyc_refresh_case_open: the kyc refresh case {} is open
predicate_mappings.case_associated_transaction: the case {} is associated with the transaction event {}
predicate_mappings.case_transaction_linked_flag: the case {} has a transaction linked flag
predicate_mappings.case_escalation_initiated: the case {} has an escalation initiated
predicate_mappings.case_bound_screening_profile: the case {} is bound to the screening profile {}
predicate_mappings.case_bound_data_source: the case {} is bound to the data source {}
predicate_mappings.case_bound_watchlist: the case {} is bound to the watchlist {}
predicate_mappings.case_bound_trigger_type: the case {} is bound to the trigger type {}
predicate_mappings.case_risk_check_assessed: the case {} has the risk check {} assessed
predicate_mappings.case_escalation_acknowledged: the case escalation for {} has been acknowledged
predicate_mappings.case_evidence_attested: the evidence for {} has been attested
predicate_mappings.case_policy_binding_present: {} has a policy binding present with {}
predicate_mappings.case_associated_escalation_member: {} is the escalation member associated with the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_bound_approval_policy: {} is the approval policy bound to the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_policy_cross_link: {} is linked to the approval policy {}

open_kyc_refresh_case.description: open a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only open a kyc refresh case A if it is not the case that the kyc refresh case A is open and it is not the case that A has been finalized
effects: Once I open a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that the kyc refresh case A is open

associate_transaction_with_case.description: associate a transaction event B with a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only associate a transaction event B with a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the kyc refresh case A is open and B is available and B is allowed for the case A
I can only associate a transaction event B with a kyc refresh case A if it is not the case that the case A has a transaction linked flag
effects: Once I associate a transaction event B with a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that the case A is associated with the transaction event B and the case A has a transaction linked flag
Once I associate a transaction event B with a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

dissociate_transaction_from_case.description: dissociate a transaction event B from a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only dissociate a transaction event B from a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the case A is associated with the transaction event B

I can only dissociate a transaction event B from a kyc refresh case A if it is not the case that the case A has screening completed and it is not the case that the case escalation for A has been acknowledged
effects: Once I dissociate a transaction event B from a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I dissociate a transaction event B from a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is associated with the transaction event B and it is not the case anymore that the case A has a transaction linked flag and it is not the case anymore that the case A has an escalation initiated and it is not the case anymore that the case A has remediation completed and it is not the case anymore that A is pending manual review and it is not the case anymore that A is approved and it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation marker

create_remediation_task_for_case.description: create a remediation task B for a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only create a remediation task B for a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the kyc refresh case A is open and B is available
effects: Once I create a remediation task B for a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that A is assigned the remediation task B
Once I create a remediation task B for a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_remediation_task.description: release a remediation task B from a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only release a remediation task B from a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that A is assigned the remediation task B
effects: Once I release a remediation task B from a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a remediation task B from a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned the remediation task B

initiate_escalation_for_remediation_task.description: initiate escalation for a remediation task B in a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only initiate escalation for a remediation task B in a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the kyc refresh case A is open and the case A has a transaction linked flag and A is assigned the remediation task B
I can only initiate escalation for a remediation task B in a kyc refresh case A if it is not the case that the case A has an escalation initiated
effects: Once I initiate escalation for a remediation task B in a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that the case A has an escalation initiated

escalate_by_compliance_officer.description: escalate a kyc refresh case A by a compliance officer B
preconditions: I can only escalate a kyc refresh case A by a compliance officer B if it is the case that the kyc refresh case A is open and the case A has a transaction linked flag and B is available
I can only escalate a kyc refresh case A by a compliance officer B if it is not the case that the case A has an escalation initiated
effects: Once I escalate a kyc refresh case A by a compliance officer B, it is the case that the case A has an escalation initiated and A is pending manual review
Once I escalate a kyc refresh case A by a compliance officer B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

attestor_attest_remediation.description: attest remediation for a kyc refresh case A with a remediation task B by an authorized attestor C
preconditions: I can only attest remediation for a kyc refresh case A with a remediation task B by an authorized attestor C if it is the case that the case A has an escalation initiated and the case A has a transaction linked flag and A is assigned the remediation task B and C is available
I can only attest remediation for a kyc refresh case A with a remediation task B by an authorized attestor C if it is not the case that the case A has remediation completed
effects: Once I attest remediation for a kyc refresh case A with a remediation task B by an authorized attestor C, it is the case that the case A has remediation completed
Once I attest remediation for a kyc refresh case A with a remediation task B by an authorized attestor C, it is not the case anymore that A is pending manual review

attest_remediation_via_approval_policy.description: attest remediation for a kyc refresh case A via an approval policy B
preconditions: I can only attest remediation for a kyc refresh case A via an approval policy B if it is the case that the case A has a transaction linked flag and B is enforced for A
I can only attest remediation for a kyc refresh case A via an approval policy B if it is not the case that the case A has remediation completed
effects: Once I attest remediation for a kyc refresh case A via an approval policy B, it is the case that the case A has remediation completed
Once I attest remediation for a kyc refresh case A via an approval policy B, it is not the case anymore that A is pending manual review

bind_screening_profile_to_case.description: bind a screening profile B to a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only bind a screening profile B to a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the kyc refresh case A is open and B is available and B is allowed for the case A
effects: Once I bind a screening profile B to a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that the case A is bound to the screening profile B
Once I bind a screening profile B to a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_screening_profile_from_case.description: unbind a screening profile B from a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only unbind a screening profile B from a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the case A is bound to the screening profile B
effects: Once I unbind a screening profile B from a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a screening profile B from a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is bound to the screening profile B

bind_data_source_to_case.description: bind a third party data source B to a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only bind a third party data source B to a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the kyc refresh case A is open and B is available and B is allowed for the case A
effects: Once I bind a third party data source B to a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that the case A is bound to the data source B
Once I bind a third party data source B to a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_data_source_from_case.description: unbind a third party data source B from a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only unbind a third party data source B from a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the case A is bound to the data source B
effects: Once I unbind a third party data source B from a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a third party data source B from a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is bound to the data source B

bind_watchlist_to_case.description: bind a watchlist B to a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only bind a watchlist B to a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the kyc refresh case A is open and B is available and B is allowed for the case A
effects: Once I bind a watchlist B to a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that the case A is bound to the watchlist B
Once I bind a watchlist B to a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_watchlist_from_case.description: unbind a watchlist B from a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only unbind a watchlist B from a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the case A is bound to the watchlist B
effects: Once I unbind a watchlist B from a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a watchlist B from a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is bound to the watchlist B

bind_trigger_type_to_case.description: bind a kyc refresh trigger type B to a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only bind a kyc refresh trigger type B to a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the kyc refresh case A is open and B trigger type is available and B is allowed for the case A
effects: Once I bind a kyc refresh trigger type B to a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that the case A is bound to the trigger type B
Once I bind a kyc refresh trigger type B to a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that B trigger type is available

unbind_trigger_type_from_case.description: unbind a kyc refresh trigger type B from a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only unbind a kyc refresh trigger type B from a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the case A is bound to the trigger type B
effects: Once I unbind a kyc refresh trigger type B from a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that B trigger type is available
Once I unbind a kyc refresh trigger type B from a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is bound to the trigger type B

execute_risk_check_and_aggregate.description: execute risk check a risk check B and aggregate for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile C and a third party data source D
preconditions: I can only execute risk check a risk check B and aggregate for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile C and a third party data source D if it is the case that the case A has a transaction linked flag and the case A is bound to the screening profile C and the case A is bound to the data source D and B is available and B is allowed for the case A

I can only execute risk check a risk check B and aggregate for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile C and a third party data source D if it is not the case that the case A has screening completed
effects: Once I execute risk check a risk check B and aggregate for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile C and a third party data source D, it is the case that the case A has the risk check B assessed and the case A has screening completed
Once I execute risk check a risk check B and aggregate for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile C and a third party data source D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

execute_risk_check_with_identity_and_esc.description: execute risk check a risk check B with identity an identity document D and escalation for a kyc refresh case A using a watchlist C
preconditions: I can only execute risk check a risk check B with identity an identity document D and escalation for a kyc refresh case A using a watchlist C if it is the case that the case A has a transaction linked flag and the case A is bound to the watchlist C and D is available and B is available and B is allowed for the case A and D is allowed for the case A

I can only execute risk check a risk check B with identity an identity document D and escalation for a kyc refresh case A using a watchlist C if it is not the case that the case A has screening completed
effects: Once I execute risk check a risk check B with identity an identity document D and escalation for a kyc refresh case A using a watchlist C, it is the case that the case A has the risk check B assessed and the case A has screening completed and A has an escalation marker and A is pending manual review

Once I execute risk check a risk check B with identity an identity document D and escalation for a kyc refresh case A using a watchlist C, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

clear_escalation_marker.description: clear escalation marker for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile B and a third party data source C
preconditions: I can only clear escalation marker for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile B and a third party data source C if it is the case that the case A has screening completed and A has an escalation marker and the case A is bound to the screening profile B and the case A is bound to the data source C
effects: Once I clear escalation marker for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile B and a third party data source C, it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation marker and it is not the case anymore that A is pending manual review

request_escalation_approval.description: request escalation approval for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile B and a third party data source C with an escalation group member D
preconditions: I can only request escalation approval for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile B and a third party data source C with an escalation group member D if it is the case that the case A has remediation completed and the case A has screening completed and the case A is bound to the screening profile B and the case A is bound to the data source C and D is the escalation member associated with the case A

I can only request escalation approval for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile B and a third party data source C with an escalation group member D if it is not the case that A is pending manual review and it is not the case that the case escalation for A has been acknowledged
effects: Once I request escalation approval for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile B and a third party data source C with an escalation group member D, it is the case that the case escalation for A has been acknowledged

confirm_escalation_approval.description: confirm escalation approval for a kyc refresh case A using a watchlist B and a kyc refresh trigger type C with a senior escalation member D
preconditions: I can only confirm escalation approval for a kyc refresh case A using a watchlist B and a kyc refresh trigger type C with a senior escalation member D if it is the case that the case A has remediation completed and the case A has screening completed and the case A is bound to the watchlist B and the case A is bound to the trigger type C and D is the escalation member associated with the case A

I can only confirm escalation approval for a kyc refresh case A using a watchlist B and a kyc refresh trigger type C with a senior escalation member D if it is not the case that the case escalation for A has been acknowledged
effects: Once I confirm escalation approval for a kyc refresh case A using a watchlist B and a kyc refresh trigger type C with a senior escalation member D, it is the case that the case escalation for A has been acknowledged and A is pending manual review

finalize_escalation_approval.description: finalize escalation approval for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile B and a third party data source C
preconditions: I can only finalize escalation approval for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile B and a third party data source C if it is the case that the case escalation for A has been acknowledged and A is pending manual review and the case A is bound to the screening profile B and the case A is bound to the data source C
effects: Once I finalize escalation approval for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile B and a third party data source C, it is the case that A is approved

Once I finalize escalation approval for a kyc refresh case A using a screening profile B and a third party data source C, it is not the case anymore that A is pending manual review and it is not the case anymore that the case A has remediation completed and it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation marker

attestor_validate_task_after_approval.description: attestor validate a remediation task B for a kyc refresh case A with an authorized attestor C after approval
preconditions: I can only attestor validate a remediation task B for a kyc refresh case A with an authorized attestor C after approval if it is the case that A is approved and the case escalation for A has been acknowledged and the case A has a transaction linked flag and A is assigned the remediation task B and C is available
I can only attestor validate a remediation task B for a kyc refresh case A with an authorized attestor C after approval if it is not the case that the case A has remediation completed
effects: Once I attestor validate a remediation task B for a kyc refresh case A with an authorized attestor C after approval, it is the case that the case A has remediation completed

assign_attestor_to_case.description: assign attestor to a kyc refresh case A for a remediation task B
preconditions: I can only assign attestor to a kyc refresh case A for a remediation task B if it is the case that the case escalation for A has been acknowledged and the case A has remediation completed and A is assigned the remediation task B
I can only assign attestor to a kyc refresh case A for a remediation task B if it is not the case that A is pending manual review and it is not the case that the evidence for A has been attested
effects: Once I assign attestor to a kyc refresh case A for a remediation task B, it is the case that the evidence for A has been attested

assign_officer_attestation.description: assign a compliance officer B to attest a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only assign a compliance officer B to attest a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the case escalation for A has been acknowledged and the case A has remediation completed and B is available
I can only assign a compliance officer B to attest a kyc refresh case A if it is not the case that A is pending manual review and it is not the case that the evidence for A has been attested
effects: Once I assign a compliance officer B to attest a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that the evidence for A has been attested
Once I assign a compliance officer B to attest a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_approval_policy_to_case.description: bind an approval policy B to a kyc refresh case A
preconditions: I can only bind an approval policy B to a kyc refresh case A if it is the case that the evidence for A has been attested and B is available and A is linked to the approval policy B
effects: Once I bind an approval policy B to a kyc refresh case A, it is the case that B is the approval policy bound to the case A
Once I bind an approval policy B to a kyc refresh case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

orchestrate_cross_case_policy_link.description: orchestrate cross case policy link between a kyc refresh case A and a related account case B using an approval policy C
preconditions: I can only orchestrate cross case policy link between a kyc refresh case A and a related account case B using an approval policy C if it is the case that the kyc refresh case A is open and A has a related account flag and A has a policy binding present with C and C is the approval policy bound to the case B
I can only orchestrate cross case policy link between a kyc refresh case A and a related account case B using an approval policy C if it is not the case that C is enforced for A
effects: Once I orchestrate cross case policy link between a kyc refresh case A and a related account case B using an approval policy C, it is the case that C is enforced for A

mark_case_attestation_confirmed.description: mark attestation confirmed for a kyc refresh case A with a remediation task B by an authorized attestor C
preconditions: I can only mark attestation confirmed for a kyc refresh case A with a remediation task B by an authorized attestor C if it is the case that the kyc refresh case A is open and A has a related account flag and the case A has remediation completed and the evidence for A has been attested and A is assigned the remediation task B and C is available
I can only mark attestation confirmed for a kyc refresh case A with a remediation task B by an authorized attestor C if it is not the case that A has attestation confirmed
effects: Once I mark attestation confirmed for a kyc refresh case A with a remediation task B by an authorized attestor C, it is the case that A has attestation confirmed

finalize_case_without_policy.description: finalize a kyc refresh case A without policy
preconditions: I can only finalize a kyc refresh case A without policy if it is the case that A is eligible for finalization and the kyc refresh case A is open and the case A has a transaction linked flag and the case A has screening completed and the case escalation for A has been acknowledged and the evidence for A has been attested and the case A has remediation completed
I can only finalize a kyc refresh case A without policy if it is not the case that A has been finalized
effects: Once I finalize a kyc refresh case A without policy, it is the case that A has been finalized

finalize_case_with_policy.description: finalize a kyc refresh case A with an approval policy B
preconditions: I can only finalize a kyc refresh case A with an approval policy B if it is the case that A has a related account flag and the kyc refresh case A is open and the case A has a transaction linked flag and the case A has screening completed and the case escalation for A has been acknowledged and the evidence for A has been attested and the case A has remediation completed and B is enforced for A
I can only finalize a kyc refresh case A with an approval policy B if it is not the case that A has been finalized
effects: Once I finalize a kyc refresh case A with an approval policy B, it is the case that A has been finalized

finalize_case_with_attestation.description: finalize a kyc refresh case A with attestation confirmed
preconditions: I can only finalize a kyc refresh case A with attestation confirmed if it is the case that A has a related account flag and the kyc refresh case A is open and the case A has a transaction linked flag and the case A has screening completed and the case escalation for A has been acknowledged and the evidence for A has been attested and the case A has remediation completed and A has attestation confirmed
I can only finalize a kyc refresh case A with attestation confirmed if it is not the case that A has been finalized
effects: Once I finalize a kyc refresh case A with attestation confirmed, it is the case that A has been finalized

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a kyc refresh case or a transaction event or a risk check or a third party data source or a screening profile or a watchlist or a remediation task or a compliance officer or a approval policy or a authorized attestor or a identity document or a kyc refresh trigger type or a escalation group is also a object
Everything that is a escalation group member or a senior escalation member is also a escalation group
Everything that is a initiating account case or a related account case is also a kyc refresh case
